Just check a box claiming U.S. citizenship.

Another way the policies Governor Moore and the far-left Annapolis Democrats lead the nation. Maybe they should spend their time addressing this problem instead of extreme partisan gerrymandering to disenfranchise the Eastern Shore.

It was an honor to ride with the Rock Hall Volunteer Fire Company during the Fourth of July parade in Rock Hall. 

Thank you to our firefighters, volunteers, and everyone who joined us in celebrating America’s 250th birthday. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/fgJgPFW05l

Today, we celebrate 250 years of the greatest nation in the history of the world. 

We honor the generations of Americans who have fought to defend our freedom and preserve our way of life.

Happy Fourth of July! God bless America. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/jHqIfoAhne

It’s time for the Senate to stop the delays and do its job. https://t.co/wQ8GvzI1oX

Let’s get the record straight.
